ValidationRule.description: Close Date is mandatory when stage is Closed Won or Closed Lost.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Lost') ), ISBLANK(CloseDate) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Close Date is mandatory when the Opportunity is Closed Won or Closed Lost.
